title: Scrapp | Zero-waste made simple

headers.text: We help businesses, brands, and communities reduce their waste
Save $50k per year by tracking your spec data
Prevent 1,000+ hours of admin work per year
Cut costs. Prove compliance. Reduce contamination - without the spreadsheet chaos.
Reduce your waste costs by 60% in 90 days
The answer isn't more spreadsheets...it's better connected data.
Track your waste. Communicate your impact. Save money.
Identify waste patterns and discover cuts - before they hit the bin.
Uncover hidden compliance fees and get out of spreadsheets.
Increase recycling program engagement and reduce contamination rates.
Stop paying for landfill fees & scope 3 guesswork
Prove packaging circularity in every market
Cut contamination rates & call query volumes
Reduce confusion by the bin & rebuild trust in the system

paragraphs: "We are able to engage with colleagues and drive the correct behaviours, therefore enabling us to reach our recycling goals.”
"A good example of commitment to continuous improvement and environmental stewardship."
"Highly useful in communication with residents, reducing customer service time as well as helping to engage residents, especially younger audience".
We have a waste problem. We produce too much of it.
By 2050, plastic production is expected to triple. Waste accounts for 50% of all greenhouse gas emissions.

Most businesses don't realise that waste is simplymisallocated resources. With upcoming policies, global supply chains, and customer pressure - organizations must start reducing waste before it becomes too costly.
Data drives all business decisions, but waste has always suffered from inaccurate data, if any. Fragmented data in spreadsheets is prone to errors that prevents teams from collaborating effectively.
Whether you produce waste in your operations, distribute it on retail shelves or manage your programs - we enable you to monitor, verify, and reduce it in real-time.
Join our community newsletter to get updates and submit feedback
Transforming the way businesses and people achieve their zero-waste goals.
content: We help businesses, brands, and communities reduce their waste Save $50k per year by tracking your spec data Prevent 1,000+ hours of admin work per year Cut costs. Prove compliance. Reduce contamination - without the spreadsheet chaos. Reduce your waste costs by 60% in 90 days The answer isn't more spreadsheets...it's better connected data. Track your waste. Communicate your impact. Save money. Watch it in action Stay in the loop Identify waste patterns and discover cuts - before they hit the bin. Uncover hidden compliance fees and get out of spreadsheets. Increase recycling program engagement and reduce contamination rates. Stop paying for landfill fees & scope 3 guesswork Prove packaging circularity in every market Cut contamination rates & call query volumes Reduce confusion by the bin & rebuild trust in the system "We are able to engage with colleagues and drive the correct behaviours, therefore enabling us to reach our recycling goals.” Energy & Sustainability Manager "A good example of commitment to continuous improvement and environmental stewardship." "Highly useful in communication with residents, reducing customer service time as well as helping to engage residents, especially younger audience". Marketing and Communications Officer We have a waste problem. We produce too much of it. By 2050, plastic production is expected to triple. Waste accounts for 50% of all greenhouse gas emissions. Most businesses don't realise that waste is simplymisallocated resources. With upcoming policies, global supply chains, and customer pressure - organizations must start reducing waste before it becomes too costly. Data drives all business decisions, but waste has always suffered from inaccurate data, if any. Fragmented data in spreadsheets is prone to errors that prevents teams from collaborating effectively. Whether you produce waste in your operations, distribute it on retail shelves or manage your programs - we enable you to monitor, verify, and reduce it in real-time. Join our community newsletter to get updates and submit feedback Transforming the way businesses and people achieve their zero-waste goals.
